layout_and_spacing.grid_system: CSS Columns for masonry feed (columns-1 md:columns-2 lg:columns-3 gap-8).
layout_and_spacing.dividers: Use border-b-2 or border-r-2 with border-black/30 (solid or dashed) to separate content.
layout_and_spacing.card_style: NO rounded corners. NO soft shadows. Transparent background, relying on borders and typography to separate posts.

Masthead.description: Main site header. Massive 'Fısıltı Gazetesi' text (Playfair Display Black). Date and issue number below it, bounded by thick double borders (border-y-4 border-double border-black). No transparent sticky header, keep it solid or purely relative to page.

Whisper_Card.description: Feed item. No typical card box. Category tag as a 'rubber stamp'. First letter of whisper text is a drop cap (text-5xl float-left pr-2 pt-1 font-playfair). Text uses Special Elite font. Bottom has Upvote/Downvote.

Stamp_Badge.description: Looks like a rubber stamp: uppercase, tracking-widest, text-[#B22222], border-2 border-[#B22222], transform -rotate-2 or rotate-2, mix-blend-multiply opacity-90, px-2 py-1 inline-block.

Input_Form.description: Report a whisper form. Inputs styled like telegrams: border-b-2 border-black/50 border-dashed, bg-transparent, rounded-none. No SaaS-style focus rings, just a solid black border-bottom on focus.

textures.description: Vintage paper texture for global background overlay. Usage: fixed div covering screen, bg-cover, mix-blend-multiply, opacity-20, pointer-events-none.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Do not use standard Shadcn cards with rounded borders and shadows. The aesthetic is a 1960s Turkish newspaper.
Must add the Google Fonts import to the main CSS/HTML and configure Tailwind to use them as font-sans/serif/mono appropriately.
Apply a global sepia background (#F4EFE6) and use the provided vintage paper texture image as a fixed overlay with `mix-blend-multiply` and `opacity-[0.15]`.
Layout relies heavily on CSS columns and dashed/solid black borders to separate content, typical of newspaper layouts.
Use standard Lucide icons but style them flat (ink color), no modern hover backgrounds.
All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="upvote-button"`).

Use pure HTML+Tailwind for the feed layout. Use Shadcn strictly for complex interactions but STRIP their default Vercel-look styling completely (remove rounded corners, replace box-shadows with sharp 1px borders).
Ensure the Turkish text uses correct characters. Add typical old newspaper phrases like 'Son Dakika', 'Günün Fısıltısı'.
